scope: Only for selecting the Ark model used when OpenClaw invokes the claude-code agent in Agent Room/runtime work.

doubao_family.policy: All Doubao-family models are fully disabled for Claude Code as of 2026-05-22 per Alex directive. No exceptions.

plain_chat.reason: ordinary Agent Room Claude Code discussion; avoid Kimi overuse; V4-flash for speed, V4-pro as deeper backup; DeepSeek v3.2 retired after 2026-05-25 V4 smoke

minimax_glm_pair.reason: user explicitly requested this turn to prioritize both minimax and glm in-chain

workspace_write.reason: source-edit/runtime work; prefer GLM then DeepSeek V4-pro/V4-flash before MiniMax/Kimi; DeepSeek v3.2 retired after live V4 smoke

peer_review.reason: peer review / challenge / second opinion; prefer MiniMax then DeepSeek V4; DeepSeek v3.2 retired after live V4 smoke

long_context.reason: long-context synthesis is the main place where Kimi remains first choice; DeepSeek V4-pro as second; DeepSeek v3.2 retired after live V4 smoke

deep_reasoning.reason: explicit deep reasoning / complex logic; DeepSeek V4-pro first and V4-flash second after 2026-05-25 Ark Coding Plan live smoke; deepseek-reasoner is excluded because Ark Coding Plan returned UnsupportedModel

low_stakes_formatting.reason: least-important formatting/low-risk cleanup only; V4-flash first for speed and cost; Doubao removed 2026-05-22; DeepSeek v3.2 retired after live V4 smoke

last_direct_provider_smoke.result: deepseek-v4-pro and deepseek-v4-flash succeeded through Ark Coding Plan; deepseek-reasoner returned UnsupportedModel; later minimal retry hit AccountQuotaExceeded until 2026-05-25T23:08:24+08:00
